paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc is 6.05, with a 2.02% increase from the prior close and a 36.32% decrease over a 20-session window. The price is as of July 17, 2026.

Recent news includes reports of a $486M loss and zero revenue, as well as the departure of CEO Toby Neugebauer and director Miles Everson, who cited governance concerns. The company has also completed a $375M convertible senior notes offering. Retail traders have remained bullish on the stock despite the sharp selloff.

There have been 25 total filings, including 1 Form 4 filing and 19 proxy solicitation filings. Recent filings include an 8-K form disclosing the issuance of $431.25 million in convertible senior notes and the resignation of director Miles Everson due to a disagreement over access to company books and records.
